caption: A man wearing a grey suit jacket, a white dress shirt, and a patterned tie speaks in front of a white backdrop featuring the hashtag "#BigDataSV" and the year "2015." A blue banner at the bottom of the screen displays the text "JEFF KELLY | @jeffreyfkelly" and "Senior Analyst Wikbon," along with a logo for "INFO-OBJECTS." The man gestures with his hands to emphasize his points as he speaks. In the initial moments, he holds both hands up with palms facing inward and fingers slightly curled. As the sequence progresses, he opens his mouth wider and extends his right arm outward, palm up, before bringing his hands back toward his chest in a more focused gesture. The lighting is bright and consistent, focusing on the speaker against the branded background throughout the clip.
